{{Infobox location
| name = Mists of Asphodel
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Mists of Asphodel]] can drive some people insane.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Mists of Asphodel]] are illusions that feed on emotion.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Mists of Asphodel]] can cause a person's mind to shut down or drive them insane.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
